rdfs:label: boolProperty
dc:description: Indicates that the schema attribute represents something that is either true or false and does not have a value. Attributes without this value are assumed to have string values.

rdfs:label: unitClassProperty
dc:description: Indicates that the schema attribute is meant to be applied to unit classes.

rdfs:label: unitModifierProperty
dc:description: Indicates that the schema attribute is meant to be applied to unit modifier classes.

rdfs:label: unitProperty
dc:description: Indicates that the schema attribute is meant to be applied to units within a unit class.

rdfs:label: valueClassProperty
dc:description: Indicates that the schema attribute is meant to be applied to value classes.
